title: MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `key_dup()`
description:
MonetDB Mar2025-SP1 crashes at `key_dup()`.

It can be reproduced on the docker image `monetdb/monetdb:Mar2025-SP1` and `monetdb/dev-builds:default`.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', 25);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (3, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_name_age ON test_table (name, age);
key_bug_features: Crash during key duplication in MonetDB
